steps.title: Isolate c
steps.content: Since $36f$ is multiplied by $c$, divide both sides by $36f$: $c=\frac{b}{36f}$.

steps.title: Match the choice
steps.content: The equation $c=\frac{b}{36f}$ matches the correct answer, A.

steps.title: Use division because c is multiplied
steps.content: In $b=36cf$, the factors next to $c$ are $36$ and $f$. Dividing by the full product $36f$ leaves $c$ alone on one side.
